name: io.github.lambopoewert/madeonsol
description: Solana memecoin intelligence — real-time KOL wallet trades (1,000+ tracked wallets), Pump.fun deployer reputation, token quality scoring, wallet PnL, and pre-confirm launch alerts. 40+ tools. Free API key or pay-per-call via x402 USDC on Solana.

environmentVariables.name: MADEONSOL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: MadeOnSol API key (msk_...). Get one free at https://madeonsol.com/pricing. Optional — AI agents can instead pay per call via x402 by setting SVM_PRIVATE_KEY.
